    employee_name:  $('📋 Parse AI Decision').first().json.employee.Name,
    date:           $('📋 Parse AI Decision').first().json.request.date,

}) }}

parameters.content:
## ENTRY POINT

***Receives POST to /schedule-check. Payload: employee_id, room_id, date, start_time, end_time, shift_type, notes.***

## DATA FETCH #1

***Reads the Employees sheet — loads all employee IDs, names, departments, positions into memory.***

## DATA FETCH #2

***Reads the Shifts sheet — all existing scheduled shifts with employee, room, date, and time data.***

## DATA FETCH #3

***Reads the Rooms sheet — room IDs, names, capacity, and location for booking validation.***

## BUSINESS LOGIC

***Runs 3 conflict checks: (1) employee double-booking, (2) room double-booking, (3) consecutive rest days. Finds alt rooms & dates.***

## INPUT GATE

***Checks if employee exists, date is valid & future, room is known. True → AI chain. False → instant HTTP 400 error.***

## VALIDATION ERROR 

***Returns HTTP 400 with error code (INVALID_EMPLOYEE, INVALID_DATE, PAST_DATE, INVALID_ROOM) and a readable message.***

## LLM PROVIDER

***GLM-4.5 via ZAI Models, temp 0.3. Low creativity setting ensures consistent, rule-following decisions every time.***

## AI ANALYSIS

***Sends full conflict context to GLM-4.5. Returns JSON: status (CLEAR/CONFLICT), warm first-name message, suggested room & date, reasoning.***

## AI OUTPUT PARSER

***Strips markdown fences, extracts JSON. Generates unique Request_ID (SC-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS). Deduplicates alt rooms & dates.***

## FINAL BRANCH 

***Checks is_clear flag. True → Clear path (save + 200 OK). False → Conflict path (save + 200 with conflict detail).***

## AUDIT LOG

***Appends to Schedule_Checks: Request_ID, employee, date, shift, room, status=Clear, no conflicts, AI reasoning.***

## SUCCESS REPLY

***Returns success=true, status="clear", AI message, full schedule data, empty conflicts array, and available alternatives.***

## AUDIT LOG

***Same fields but status=Conflict. Conflict details joined with " | " in the Conflicts column. AI reasoning saved.***

## CONFLICT REPLY 
***Returns success=false, status="conflict", AI message, full conflict list, suggested_room, suggested_date, alternatives.***
